### Post by jd1024 on 2010-05-15
I had my asus at3n7a-i with the nvidia ion working perfectly with my Vizio LCD TV, but after a power outage it stopped working. Looking at my nvidia x server settings under display config I first noticed I cant select Twinview, its greyed out and it only show CRT-0. Here is my xorg. Any help is greatly appriciated.
